title: Why Is This Level So Hard? — Soccer Fail Bait
hook_3s: Finger swipes, ball curves wide, hits the post — stickman keeper laughs. "WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD?"
scene_flow: 0-3s: Tight over-the-shoulder shot of the sandy-yellow pitch. A finger swipes the ball — trajectory trail arcs, ball clangs the post and bounces out. Big red FAIL stamp.
3-7s: Retry. Finger swipes again, ball weaves past two stickman defenders but the keeper tips it over. Level tracker shows 'LEVEL 4' still locked. Confused emoji overlay.
7-11s: Third attempt — exaggerated wobbly swipe, ball loops backward into own net. Stickman shooter face-palms. Overlay: 'CAN YOU WIN?'
11-15s: Cursor taps a perfect curved swipe, ball rockets top-corner, net ripples, confetti pops in #99CC33 green. CTA slams in: PLAY FREE.
visual_direction: Lean fully into Crazy Kick's sunny, low-poly DNA: sandy-yellow (#F5D77F) pitch with chalk-white lines, sky-blue (#1CB4F0) stadium backdrop, lime-green (#99CC33) UI chrome and confetti. Keep the third-person behind-the-ball camera identical to the live game, with the signature dotted trajectory trail, level progression bar at the top, and simple stickman defenders/keeper. Animation should feel intentionally clumsy on the fail beats (overshoots, wobbly trail) and crisp on the win beat — the contrast sells the "looks easy, actually tricky" bait.
text_overlays: WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD?
rationale: Voodoo's current rotation on Crazy Kick is all straight gameplay/glory copy ("Kick your way to glory") with zero fail-bait or curiosity-gap framing — this brief imports the market-winning "WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD / CAN YOU WIN?" hook formula they're missing. UA should test this against the existing Admob video stack as a CTR/IPM lift play; the fail→win arc also doubles as a soft tutorial for the swipe mechanic, which should improve D1 retention on installs from this creative.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, 9:16 vertical mobile ad still, authentic in-game screenshot of Crazy Kick! Fun Football arcade soccer game: third-person behind-the-ball view on a sandy-yellow (#F5D77F) low-poly football pitch with chalk-white lines, sky-blue (#1CB4F0) stadium and sky in background, white soccer ball mid-air with a glowing dotted trajectory trail curving toward the goal, two simple stickman defenders in colored jerseys lunging to block, stickman goalkeeper diving, level progression tracker bar at top of screen, lime-green (#99CC33) UI chrome and HUD buttons, bold white impact-font on-screen text 'WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD?' across the upper third, 3D hyper-casual low-poly bright and colorful with simple stickman characters, vibrant sunny lighting, mobile game UI, no logos
